description.value:
Your understanding of living systems lets you treat more than wounds. You can use Nature instead of Medicine to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN] and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh], provided the disease or poison comes from a natural creature, plant, fungus, venom, environmental hazard, or similar natural source.

When you successfully use Natural Medicine to Treat Wounds, the target also gains a +1 circumstance bonus to the next Fortitude save it attempts against disease or poison before your next daily preparations.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-skillpaths.pf2e-skillpath-compendium.Item.jO7wMhnjT7yoAtQg]
